caption: The video features a minimalist white background containing a black logo. The logo consists of the text "TFNN.com" in a bold, sans-serif typeface, with the smaller phrase "EDUCATING INVESTORS" centered directly beneath it. In the initial frames, the logo remains stationary and centered on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the logo remains identical in appearance and position, but the final frame shows a complete transition to a blank white screen, as the logo vanishes entirely. No people, objects, or other settings are present throughout the clip, focusing exclusively on the disappearance of the corporate branding.
